allow: Bash(cd D:/FellowVectorSite && npm create astro@latest . -- --template minimal --no-install --no-git 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/FellowVectorSite && npm create astro@latest fellowvector -- --template minimal --no-install --no-git --yes 2>&1)

Bash(mv D:/FellowVectorSite/fellowvector/* D:/FellowVectorSite/ && mv D:/FellowVectorSite/fellowvector/.* D:/FellowVectorSite/ 2>/dev/null; rmdir D:/FellowVectorSite/fellowvector && ls D:/FellowVectorSite/)
